title: Elite Publishing House E-Waste Management Workflow
description: A flowchart illustrating the lifecycle of electronic equipment at a publishing house, from acquisition to responsible disposal or recycling, highlighting key decision points for e-waste management.
elements: Acquisition of New Equipment (Computers, Printers, Servers)
relationships: Equipment is acquired and used until a decision is made on its end-of-life
Decommissioned equipment is assessed; reusable items are refurbished, non-reusable items are sent to a certified recycler
The recycler processes materials for recovery, diverting waste from landfill
